title: Director (Environmental Engineering & Consultancy)
description:
Job Summary

The Director will provide strategic leadership for the company's environmental consulting, engineering design, and management services. They will drive business growth, secure new opportunities, manage high-level client relationships, and ensure technical excellence across multidisciplinary projects such as Environmental Impact Assessments (EIAs), sustainable design, carbon strategy, and environmental site assessments.

Responsibilities

  • Define and implement business strategies to expand the company’s presence in the environmental engineering sector, establishing long-range operating goals.
  • Drive sales growth by managing the bidding and tender process to secure new business opportunities.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, regulatory bodies, and government agencies such as NEA, PUB, and BCA in Singapore to influence project outcomes and compliance.
  • Oversee the technical delivery of multidisciplinary projects, ensuring adherence to international standards, local regulations, and high-quality benchmarks.
  • Provide expert technical guidance on environmental regulations, sustainability practices, and innovative design solutions to support project success.
  • Manage the profit and loss (P&L) of the business unit, including budgeting, forecasting, and implementing strategies to maximize profitability.
  • Lead, mentor, and develop a high-performing team of engineers and consultants, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous professional growth.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate environmental strategies into broader business objectives and client solutions.

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or equivalent in Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Civil Engineering, or a closely related field.
  • Minimum of 8+ years of relevant experience in environmental consulting or engineering design.
  • Proven track record in senior leadership roles, managing teams, and delivering large-scale multidisciplinary projects.
  • Demonstrated experience in business development, securing tenders, and managing client relationships.
  • Strong knowledge of environmental modeling software such as CAD, GIS, and AutoCAD.
  • Expertise in Environmental Impact Assessments (EIAs), environmental auditing, water/wastewater treatment design, and remediation.
  • Exceptional leadership, communication, and presentation skills.
  • Strong commercial acumen and strategic thinking abilities.
  • Ability to manage multiple stakeholders and work effectively under pressure.
